# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "issuer.com"
    jwksUri: "jwks.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    jwtHeaders:
    - name: "Authorization"
      prefix: "Bearer "
    claimsToExtract:
    - key: "role"
      source: "jwt.payload"
    - key: "userId"
      source: "jwt.payload"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  rules:
  - from: []
    to:
    - operation:
        method: POST
        path: "/api/*"
    when:
    - key: request.headers["role"]
      values: ["admin", "user"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation-fallback
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "fallback.issuer.com"
    jwksUri: "fallback.jwks.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    jwtHeaders:
    - name: "Authorization"
      prefix: "Bearer "
    claimsToExtract:
    - key: "role"
      source: "jwt.payload"
    - key: "userId"
      source: "jwt.payload"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation-fallback
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  rules:
  - from: []
    to:
    - operation:
        method: POST
        path: "/api/*"
    when:
    - key: request.headers["role"]
      values: ["fallback.admin", "fallback.user"]
